comments.text:
Respected sir,

I have taken my car insurance from icici Lombard general insurance co. ltd.,  my policy no. is 3001/MI-03281183/00/000 which is zero depreciation policy. My car had met which an accident on 18Th August 2016 near panipat due to sudden stop of a vehicle driving in front of my car due to which I have also stopped my vehicle immediately but the car driving on my back side was not able to stop his vehicle and he hit my car so badly from the back side due to which my vehicles move forward and hit the car standing on the left side of my car. 
I had a conversation with my surveyor name pakajendra singh contact no.-8588879079 he told me that they can only pass the clam of back side of my car while there is also damage on the left side of my car.
And when I call the surveyor that why you are not passing the claim of the left side of my car then he said if you want to repair the left side of your car they you have to fill the another claim form, why I need to fill another claim form while both the damage of my car happen at the same time.
THIS ICICI LOMBARD IS A SCAM PLEASE DON’T TAKE INSURANCE FROM THIS COMPANY AT TIME TO GIVING INSURANCE THEY WILL TREAT YOU LIKE YOU ARE REALLY SPECIAL BUT WHEN YOU ARE TAKING THE CLAIM FORM THIS COMPANY THEY WILL TEAT YOU LIKE YOU ARE ASSSSSHOLLLLLEEEEE…
And that surveyor pakajendra sight is big FRAUD PLEASE BEWARE FROM THAT COMPANY.


Regards,
Abhinav Massey
Contact number-8802360432
comments.author: @swativerma8450
